name: Hex Maniac TF / Transformation (Pokemon)
description:
(CW: Transformation, mental change, AI intentionally roleplays as user)
"Yes... You're the one..."
Kekekeke... You've been possessed! Transformed via ghostly possession into a sexy, cute and creepy Hex Maniac, you're compelled to grin and laugh like a true hexy~
Of course, you aren't as mean as you look! You really just want company...

(Update: Expanded title and tags a bit to make it easier to find.)
